channel.title: Posts on sasta sundar tikau
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on sasta sundar tikau

item.title: The Absorption Machine: How China Domesticated Foreign Ideas
item.description: China produced transformed traditions that survived political disruption and lost their foreign origin more completely than any comparable case. The question is what structural apparatus produced that outcome — and what the Roman, Byzantine, and Indian cases reveal when examined alongside China.

item.title: Your Brain Is Running a Drill: The Real Psychology Behind True Crime's Grip
item.description: The obvious framing is morbid entertainment. The real story is a psychological survival system — preparation, empathy, and the brain's ancient threat-processing machinery.

item.title: Every Saint Was First a Scandal — Kabir. Bulleh Shah. Ibn Arabi. Nusrat.
item.description: They crossed the hardest boundary in their tradition. Got rejected, accused, cut off. Then they died — and everyone claimed them.

item.title: The Rewrite Is Dead. Long Live the Rewrite.
item.description: How AI coding agents broke the oldest rule in software engineering — and what actually matters now.
